name: Spiced Root Vegetable Cakes with Tamarind & Date Sauce

ingredients.item:
500g (1lb 2oz) potatoes (I prefer waxy, but floury are also fine), scrubbed
1 bunch of spring onions, thinly sliced
2 carrots, coarsely grated
1 parsnip, finely grated
1 large beetroot, finely grated
2 tsp ground cumin
2 tsp turmeric
2 tsp ground coriander
1 small bunch of coriander, leaves picked and finely chopped, plus extra to garnish
2 small red chillies, finely chopped (optional)
2 large free-range eggs
2 tbsp plain flour
sea salt and freshly ground black pepper
vegetable oil, for frying
ingredients.original:
500g (1lb 2oz) potatoes (I prefer waxy, but floury are also fine), scrubbed
1 bunch of spring onions, thinly sliced
2 carrots, coarsely grated
1 parsnip, finely grated
1 large beetroot, finely grated
2 tsp ground cumin
2 tsp turmeric
2 tsp ground coriander
1 small bunch of coriander, leaves picked and finely chopped, plus extra to garnish
2 small red chillies, finely chopped (optional)
2 large free-range eggs
2 tbsp plain flour
sea salt and freshly ground black pepper
vegetable oil, for frying

ingredients.item:
100g (3½oz) dates, pitted and roughly chopped
50g (1¾oz) tamarind paste
3 tbsp clear honey
1 tsp ground cumin
½ tsp ground ginger
1 tsp crushed sea salt
squeeze of lemon juice
400ml (14fl oz) hot water

50g (1¾oz) tamarind paste
